programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Emma Thompson is wonderfully hideous as a mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: The Templeton brothers have become adults and drifted away from each other, but a new boss baby with a cutting-edge approach is about to bring them together again - and inspire a new family business.

programme.title: Harry And The Hendersons
programme.desc: An all-American dad who runs over Big Foot in the family station wagon, unwittingly opening up his home and his heart to a smelly monster that gives the family a few lessons in being human.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high-school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: The Croods

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building, she and her friends embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family.

programme.desc: The plump black-and-white bear, Po, is back in his biggest adventure yet.

programme.title: Shrek

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: Puss In Boots

programme.title: The Land Before Time

programme.title: Beethoven

programme.title: Trolls

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Small Soldiers
programme.desc: A teenage boy and his family get caught up in a war between evil toy soldiers and non-human action figures.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. But they must team up to stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: Shark Tale

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: George, the inquisitive little monkey with an insatiable taste for adventure, sets off in a brand new tale where his spunky and fun-loving nature launches him on a series of adventures.

programme.desc: A successful executive and womanizer finds his lifestyle choices have turned back on him when his new female boss turns out to be an even bigger deviant than he is.

programme.title: Dazed And Confused
programme.desc: High school pranksters get stoned and contemplate the future on the last day of school in 1976.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Men In Tights
programme.desc: Robin of Loxley, a handsome medieval knight, comes home early from the Crusades to defend England against a hostile takeover.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer and habitual liar discovers that he is unable to tell a lie or withhold the truth about anything for 24 hours after his son makes a birthday wish that comes true.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A politician's wish to change the world is heard by God, who asks him to build a modern Noah's ark. The animals and the flood arrive, along with the laughs.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Two woefully immature men are forced to live as brothers when their parents decide to get hitched.

programme.title: Dazed And Confused
programme.desc: High school pranksters get stoned and contemplate the future on the last day of school in 1976.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
programme.desc: Chuck and Larry, Brooklyn firefighters, fake a domestic partnership so Larry’s kids get benefits. When a suspicious official investigates, things spiral quickly.

programme.title: The World's End
programme.desc: Five friends who reunite in an attempt to top their epic pub crawl from 20 years earlier unwittingly become humankind's only hope for survival.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three friends try to recapture their glory days by opening up a fraternity much to the ire of Pritchard, a dean at the college who was the target of their abuse when they were all students.

programme.title: You Don't Mess With The Zohan
programme.desc: Zohan is the Israeli army's most lethal weapon. But he's tired of fighting terrorists and wants to be a hairdresser in New York, even if he has to fake his own death.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When his wife and child are in danger, a young prince from the Draculea dynasty makes a dark sacrifice to save them. He becomes the first vampire and the man who inspires the legend of Dracula.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: The Fate Of The Furious
programme.desc: When a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray his crew, the globetrotting team faces an unexpected challenge. Now they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A man meets a clone of himself and stumbles into a grand conspiracy about clones taking over the world.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports has grown into reality TV bloodlust, Jason Statham stars as a speedway champion ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive, or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: Repo Men
programme.desc: In futuristic Toronto a repo man pursues customers that can no longer pay for their implanted organs.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Based on the popular comic, a stray bullet hits an unlucky target transforming an apathetic slacker into an unparalleled enforcer of justice.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When two detectives are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the alluring and lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: A young woman is courted and swept off her feet, only to realize a gothic conspiracy is afoot.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves attempt to reclaim their stolen gold and avenge their mentor's death by creating the largest ever traffic jam in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: True account of the disastrous US raid to capture a Somali warlord in 1993. When the mission goes wrong elite forces must fight their way out.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra
programme.desc: In Kazakhstan, a convoy carrying advanced nanotech warheads is attacked. Rescued by an elite military unit, two soldiers join the team as they track a criminal group behind the assault, uncovering a deeper conspiracy.```

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego "Venom" to save his life.

programme.title: Dead Again In Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Skyscraper

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: In the Far East, Alex O'Connell, the son of famed mummy fighters Rick and Evy O'Connell, unearths the mummy of the first Emperor of Qin - a shape-shifting entity cursed by a witch centuries ago.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Set in 1998, this origin story explores the secrets of the mysterious Spencer Mansion and the ill-fated Raccoon City.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a street-racing gang led by Dom Toretto, whose fans treat him like a rock star. Dirty money, big-rig hijacking, and high-octane action rev up this thrill ride.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Based on the classic Hasbro naval combat game, this is the story of an international fleet of ships that come across an alien armada while on a Naval war games exercise.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a U.S. Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for Weapons of Mass Destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk's out to emulate his father's deeds. Spock keeps him in check as an evil Romulan creates black holes to destroy the Federation. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Dominion
programme.desc: With Earth once again dominated by prehistoric predators, two generations of heroes must unite for a globe-spanning adventure to shape the destiny of humans and dinosaurs.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

After a catastrophic crash, a pilot discovers he's stranded on Earth - 65 million years ago! With only one chance at rescue, he and the other survivor must cross a terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of death-defying adrenaline junkies on a mission to kick some ass.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports has grown into reality TV bloodlust, Jason Statham stars as a speedway champion ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive, or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: An epic adventure that sees a peaceful realm on the brink of war. Two heroes will be set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious: Tokyo Drift

programme.title: Fast & Furious

programme.desc: When an unidentified shooting victim turns out to be a rising star in the underground world of hip-hop dance battles, the CSIs turn their attention to a long list of rival dancers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a software company executive bleeds to death on a Manhattan street, the CSI's must delve into the wet and messy world of food parties , where groups of people experience food in an sensual way.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A big rig accident results in the discovery of an interstate trucking ring that specialises in human cargo and black market organ harvesting, and sets off a race against time to save a hostage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realises it's the third victim of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A reformed drug addict with everything to live for is found dead in an alley. The CSI's discover he was the victim of a premeditated plot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following a spray of machine gunfire, the CSI team rises from the chaos. But when one member's life is significantly changed, it proves to be the emotional motivation they need to piece together their lives and ultimately find the shooter.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two bodies are discovered at the North and South ends of the city, Mac and the team deftly begin to navigate the trail of evidence left behind by the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is found in Central Park, drained of blood and missing part of her ear, the CSIs jump start an investigation that takes them into the dark and mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Two days before a Grand Prix Race, when a racing legend dies in a car explosion on the streets of Manhattan, the CSIs discover that car tampering is the cause; however, the investigation leads viewers through the professional racing community and beyond.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team must unravel the series of events from a wild night for a group of friends, a night which ended in four dead bodies, and a fifth person wandering the streets covered in blood and wielding an axe.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a double homicide involving two young journalists who are investigating a story about gold fraud occurs on the eve of St. Patrick's Day, the CSIs must find the clue at the end of the rainbow.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Dr Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team uncovers an underground fighting league after they discover the body of a retired boxer buried under concrete at a construction site.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behaviour that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Shane Casey is captured by police but soon escapes. He then leaves clues for the crime lab encrypted in dollar bills that suggest that Danny is his next target.

programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI's newest employee stumbles upon a dead body in the crime lab, while Lindsay struggles to cope with the circumstances behind her commendation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder during a random video chat, and the team discovers that the victim just so happens to be a music student who lives in Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A mother identifies her son as the attacker in a brutal assault that left her seriously injured and her husband dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A Puerto Rican gang leader that Mac helped put in prison many years ago is released, and suddenly the new leaders of the gang begin turning up dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to find out who is responsible for a jewel heist at the home of a powerful defense attorney. However, they soon discover that everybody who comes in contact with the jewels is turning up dead.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: Tensions mount for the beleaguered British Prime Minister Winston Churchill (Brian Cox) in the days leading up to infamous Allied D-Day landings in Normandy, France in June, 1944. Fearful of repeating his deadly mistakes from World War I in the Battle of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with his historical destiny, Churchill is reluctant to embark on the large-scale campaign, one that the entire war effort hinges upon. Clashing with his Allied political opponents U.S. General Dwight D. Eisenhower (John Slattery) and British Field Marshal Bernard Law Montgomery (Julian Wadham), the troubled Churchill receives support and devotion from his wife, the brilliant and unflappable Clementine Churchill (Miranda Richardson). With her strength and shrewdness, “Clemmie” halts Winston’s physical, mental spiritual collapse and inspires him on to greatness.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art. The Catholic Church sees this as an attack on Biblical truth. And Carthailac, the leading prehistorian, condemns Marcelino and his discovery as fakes. The family is thrown into crisis and the cave locked up.

programme.title: Swimming With Men
programme.desc: Eric, an accountant in a full-blown mid-life crisis, joins an all-male synchronized swim team and slowly the ramshackle squad opens up to each other. But can they get their routines in sync in time to compete in Milan at the World Championship?

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: This is the story of the 1960s pop culture explosion, seen through the eyes of the British film legend Michael Caine. Caine himself narrates and appears in the film alongside The Beatles, Twiggy, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, and many other iconic names.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Finding Altamira
programme.desc: 1879, nine-year-old Maria Sautuola and her father, Marcelino, discover the first cave art and accomplished paintings of galloping bison. But Maria's mother, devout Conchita, is disturbed at the idea that prehistoric savages could have created such magnificent art. The Catholic Church sees this as an attack on Biblical truth. And Carthailac, the leading prehistorian, condemns Marcelino and his discovery as fakes. The family is thrown into crisis and the cave locked up.

programme.title: The Falling
programme.desc: Intense and troubled Lydia and charismatic Abbie are best friends experiencing a sexual awakening at their strict English girls' school. Following a tragedy, a mysterious fainting epidemic breaks out. As Lydia's symptoms worsen, she rallies against the school's authorities to uncover the underlying cause of the outbreak. Eventually her actions force old secrets to rise to the surface and she finds herself faced with a truth that she never expected.

programme.title: Swimming With Men
programme.desc: Eric, an accountant in a full-blown mid-life crisis, joins an all-male synchronized swim team and slowly the ramshackle squad opens up to each other. But can they get their routines in sync in time to compete in Milan at the World Championship?

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: Absolutely Anything will follow a disillusioned school teacher, Neil Clarke (Pegg) who suddenly finds he has the ability to do anything he wishes, a challenge bestowed upon him by a group of power-crazed aliens (voiced by Cleese, Gilliam, Jones, Palin & Idle), watching him from space. As he struggles to deal with these new found powers and the events that subsequently arise, he calls upon his loyal canine companion Dennis (voiced by Robin Williams) to help him along the way.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: The story of John Lennon’s childhood, Liverpool 1955: a smart and troubled fifteen year-old is hungry for experience. In a family full of secrets, two incredible women clash over John. Yearning to escape, John flees into the new and exciting world of rock n' roll where his fledgling genius finds a kindred spirit in the teenage Paul McCartney. Just as John begins his new life, tragedy strikes.

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: One summer at a lakeside Russian estate, friends and family gather for a weekend in the countryside. While everyone is caught up in passionately loving someone who loves somebody else, a tragicomedy unfolds about art, fame, human folly, and the eternal desire to live a purposeful life. Aristocratic actress Irina (Annette Bening, 20th Century Women) pays summer visits to her brother Sorin (Brian Dennehy, First Blood) and her son Konstantin (Billy Howle, On Chesil Beach). On one occasion, her lover, the successful novelist Boris Trigorin (Corey Stoll, Midnight in Paris), accompanies her. When Nina (Saoirse Ronan, Lady Bird), a free and innocent girl who lives on a neighbouring estate, falls in love with Boris, he basks in her adulation, while Irina is shunned by Konstantin, who loves Nina. Based on Anton Chekhov’s classic play, 'The Seagull' explores, with comedy and melancholy, the obsessive nature of love, the tangled relationships between parents and children, and the transcendent value and psychic toll of art.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: Le Week-End is a beautifully observed and poignant story of a long-married British couple (Jim Broadbent and Lindsay Duncan) who return to Paris for the first time since their honeymoon to revitalize their marriage. While there, they run into an old friend (Goldblum) who transforms their thoughts on life and their love for one another. Directed by Roger Michell (Notting Hill).

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: The Western Front, March 18, 1918. With a massive German attack imminent, a company moves up for its 6-day spell on the line. The company is lead by the war-weary, tightly wound, alcoholic Captain Stanhope. Joining the company is 2nd Lieutenant Raleigh, fresh out of training. Raleigh knew Stanhope at school and asked to be assigned to his company. Little does he realize how much Stanhope has changed.

programme.title: Burn Burn Burn
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, two girls in their late twenties embark on a road trip to spread his ashes. Seph and Alex take turns driving. Dan is in the glove compartment, in tupperware, decreasing in volume as the trip progresses.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In the 1840s, acclaimed self-taught palaeontologist Mary Anning works alone on the wild and brutal Southern English coastline of Lyme Regis. The days of her famed discoveries behind her, she now hunts for common fossils to sell to rich tourists to support herself and her ailing widowed mother. When one such tourist, Roderick Murchison, arrives in Lyme on the first leg of a European tour, he entrusts Mary with the care of his young wife Charlotte, who is recuperating from a personal tragedy. Mary, whose life is a daily struggle on the poverty line, cannot afford to turn him down but, proud and relentlessly passionate about her work, she clashes with her unwanted guest. They are two women from utterly different worlds. Yet despite the chasm between their social spheres and personalities, Mary and Charlotte discover they can each offer what the other has been searching for: the realisation that they are not alone. It is the beginning of a passionate and all-consuming love affair that will defy all social bounds and alter the course of both lives irrevocably.

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown
programme.desc: When a celestial incident causes mass societal collapse, a misfit troupe of clowns seize the chance to revive their showbiz dreams and put on a show.

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: One summer at a lakeside Russian estate, friends and family gather for a weekend in the countryside. While everyone is caught up in passionately loving someone who loves somebody else, a tragicomedy unfolds about art, fame, human folly, and the eternal desire to live a purposeful life. Aristocratic actress Irina (Annette Bening, 20th Century Women) pays summer visits to her brother Sorin (Brian Dennehy, First Blood) and her son Konstantin (Billy Howle, On Chesil Beach). On one occasion, her lover, the successful novelist Boris Trigorin (Corey Stoll, Midnight in Paris), accompanies her. When Nina (Saoirse Ronan, Lady Bird), a free and innocent girl who lives on a neighbouring estate, falls in love with Boris, he basks in her adulation, while Irina is shunned by Konstantin, who loves Nina. Based on Anton Chekhov’s classic play, 'The Seagull' explores, with comedy and melancholy, the obsessive nature of love, the tangled relationships between parents and children, and the transcendent value and psychic toll of art.

programme.title: The Secret Scripture
programme.desc: Lady Rose (Vanessa Redgrave) is an elderly woman who has lived in a hospital for over 50 years. Despite her bleak surroundings there is a light in her eyes that cannot be extinguished. Dr. Stephen Grene (Eric Bana) is drawn to her, compelled to discover her past and help gain her freedom. Through Lady Rose's 'scripture', a life of extraordinary love and great injustice emerges, revealing a remarkable young woman of courage, whose only crime was to fall in love.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: Le Week-End is a beautifully observed and poignant story of a long-married British couple (Jim Broadbent and Lindsay Duncan) who return to Paris for the first time since their honeymoon to revitalize their marriage. While there, they run into an old friend (Goldblum) who transforms their thoughts on life and their love for one another. Directed by Roger Michell (Notting Hill).

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown
programme.desc: When a celestial incident causes mass societal collapse, a misfit troupe of clowns seize the chance to revive their showbiz dreams and put on a show.

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: What happens when a world-renowned scientist, crushed by the loss of his eldest daughter, formulates a theory in conflict with religious dogma? This is the story of Charles Darwin and his master-work "The Origin of Species". It tells of a global revolution played out within the confines of a small English village; a passionate marriage torn apart by the most dangerous idea in history; and a theory saved from extinction by the logic of a child.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Mr. Turner explores the last quarter century of the great if eccentric British painter J.M.W. Turner (1775-1851).Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: What happens when a world-renowned scientist, crushed by the loss of his eldest daughter, formulates a theory in conflict with religious dogma? This is the story of Charles Darwin and his master-work "The Origin of Species". It tells of a global revolution played out within the confines of a small English village; a passionate marriage torn apart by the most dangerous idea in history; and a theory saved from extinction by the logic of a child.

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: A man of many talents arrives in a strange and haunted town on a mission to locate a stolen artefact for his menacing client, Fletcher finds himself entangled in a twilight world of vampires, sleeping beauties, Voodoo gangsters, noir private eyes, and masked avengers. Welcome to The Show.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: A young beauty impulsively marries small-town doctor in order to leave her father's pig farm far behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy husband and mundane life, and seeks prestige and excitement outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: For his directorial debut, Andy Serkis brings to life the inspiring true love story between Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease. When Robin is struck down by polio at the age of 28, he is confined to a hospital bed and given only a few months to live. With the help of Diana's twin brothers and the ground-breaking ideas of inventor Teddy Hall, Robin and Diana dare to escape the hospital ward to seek out a full and passionate life together - raising their young son, traveling and devoting their lives to helping other polio patients.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: Instead of wanting to be like her older sister, who is preparing to be a traditional Indian wife, young Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero David Beckham! Eventually, her family must decide whether or not to let Jess chase her dream – and a soccer ball – in this insightful romantic comedy.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: A young beauty impulsively marries small-town doctor in order to leave her father's pig farm far behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy husband and mundane life, and seeks prestige and excitement outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Tell It To The Bees
programme.desc: Dr. Jean Markham returns to the town she left as a teenager to take over her late father's medical practice. When a school-yard scuffle lands Charlie in her surgery, she invites him to visit the hives in her garden and tell his secrets to the bees, as she once did. The new friendship between the boy and the bee keeper brings his mother Lydia into Jean's world.

programme.title: Breathe

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A solitary middle-aged bachelor and a naive Irish teenager transform one another's lives to arrive at a place of recognition, redemption and wisdom in Atom Egoyan's adaptation of William Trevor's celebrated 1994 novel. Seventeen and pregnant, Felicia travels to England in search of her lover and is found instead by Joseph Ambrose Hilditch, a helpful catering manager whose kindness masks a serial killer. Hilditch has murdered several young women, but he has no conscious awareness of the crimes like Felicia, he doesn't see his true self. Felicia's Journey is a story of innocence lost and regained: Felicia awakens to the world's dangers and duplicities and Hilditch, who grew up lonely and unloved, comes to realise what was taken from him, and what he himself has taken.

programme.title: Urban Hymn
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the 2011 British summer riots, Michael Caton-Jones' URBAN HYMN is a redemptive coming-of-age story following wayward teen, Jamie (Letitia Wright). Encouraged by inspiring and unconventional care worker Kate (Shirley Henderson) to use singing as a release from her troubled life, Jamie's loyalties soon become torn between Kate and her possessive and volatile best friend, Leanne (Isabella Laughland).

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. It's soon clear that when it comes to keeping a secret under wraps from the rest of the family, their children are their biggest liability…

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: A talking cat, a pack of intelligent rats, and a fake pied piper work together scamming villages by charging them for dealing with staged plagues of rats, until one of their targets winds up having a far more sinister secret than their own.

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse, funny, profane, and dangerous. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut. Travelling with his devoted best friend Dickie, Dom visits his crime boss Mr Fontaine in the south of France to claim his reward. But Dom's drink and drug-fuelled ego decides that what he's lost can't be replaced. One car accident and a femme fatale later, Dom realises that his priority must be to reconnect with his long-lost daughter Evelyn. But Dom does what Dom does best. He screws things up for everyone.

programme.title: The Banksy Job
programme.desc: AK47, a self-proclaimed 'art terrorist', details the story of a time when he set out to swipe a well-known piece of street artist Banksy's public art in central London.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: Once inseparable pals, two men find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. Now, through a strange twist of fate, the pair are on the run - together.

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince Of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin Hood decides to fight back as an outlaw when faced with the tyranny of the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an All-American Girls' Professional Baseball League formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.

programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.desc: An ultra-cool, fresh out of Detroit, foul-mouthed detective is treading on toes in Beverly Hills as he zeroes in on the scum who killed his friend.

programme.desc: A slick, young Navy lawyer is assigned to investigate a murder case in which two Marines killed a fellow enlisted man, and no one's talking.
